messages.content: You are a programming assistant. Provide only code when asked.

Write an nginx server block that serves static files from /var/www/html for all requests to the root site. Constraints: - Code only, no comments and no extra text. - Do not include operational tips like reloading, permissions, or security headers.
You are a programming assistant. Provide only code when asked.

Write an nginx server block that serves static files from /var/www/html for all requests to the root site. Constraints: - Code only, no comments and no extra text. - Do not include operational tips like reloading, permissions, or security headers.

assistant.prompt_text:
<|begin_of_text|><|start_header_id|>system<|end_header_id|>

Cutting Knowledge Date: December 2023
Today Date: 26 Jul 2024

You are a programming assistant. Provide only code when asked.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

Write an nginx server block that serves static files from /var/www/html for all requests to the root site. Constraints: - Code only, no comments and no extra text. - Do not include operational tips like reloading, permissions, or security headers.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

server {
    listen 80;
    server_name _;
    root /var/www/html;
    location / {
